title: crotalaria microphylla
intro: Crotalaria microphylla, also known as the small leaf rattle pod or small leaf crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria microphylla include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria microphylla is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
